purpose: Design proposal-applier cron mechanism to break GRAO pipeline stall

application_protocol.step_2: Design validation experiment targeting proposal's tpgTarget
application_protocol.step_3: Execute experiment using available infrastructure (GHO-44 sync data, paper archive, stability metrics)
application_protocol.step_4: Record results in experiments/ with exp_YYYY-MM-DD format
application_protocol.step_5: Update GRAO STATE-MANAGEMENT.md with validation status

cluster_balancing.balancing_rule: Round-robin across clusters, skip validated clusters until 20% threshold met

stall_detection.escalation: trigger manual intervention cycle, report to boredom scan log

first_execution_plan.validation_approach: Cross-reference stability tests (TEST-MEMORY-INTEGRITY, TEST-SCORE-BOUNDS, TEST-BOREDOM-THRESHOLD) with paper archive findings on benchmark methodology
first_execution_plan.infrastructure: paper archive (459 papers), stability test suite, benchmark_2026-05-16.json

notes: Design addresses structural gap identified in cycles 138-142. First execution should validate exp_03 (benchmarking-optimization) using existing infrastructure. Cluster balancing prevents agent_prompt_optimization dominance.
